strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across backend, distributed systems, and microservices at high-throughput scale
Recent exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience running an event-driven platform on Kubernetes, showing ownership and architectural breadth
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth (credit systems, working capital, regulated trade decisioning)
Production multi-agent AI systems experience appears nascent rather than established at scale
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong distributed-systems credentials and emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the resume does not evidence the executive-level engineering leadership, team scaling, or regulated fintech-infrastructure experience this CTO role requires. Agentic AI work appears to be at the tooling/framework contribution level rather than architecting production multi-agent systems with feedback loops and evaluation infrastructure.
